subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm, steadfast and confirmed through God's grace! Many letters from thee have reached us, and from their contents [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت و نبت و تاید بفضل من الله مکاتیب متعدده آنجناب واصل و از مضمون جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Noah, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
